description: This video provides a step-by-step guide on how to verify your identity on Binance, including filling out account information, uploading ID documentation, and taking a selfie. It also offers tips for successful verification and explains the benefits of account verification, such as increased deposit and withdrawal limits.
topic_summary: Learn how to verify your Binance account in three steps: provide personal information, upload ID documentation, and submit a selfie. Tips for successful verification are also included, along with details on account limits post-verification [t=283.69].
